headline: The Delivery Deficit Hiding Inside Domino’s Q1 Earnings
summary: Domino's Pizza Inc. (NASDAQ: DPZ) shares fell after a rare double miss on revenue and earnings revealed a growing delivery deficit. While the market remains fixated on the headline miss, the real story is a sharp decline in delivery demand that is forcing a shift in how Americans buy pizza. This trend led management to slash guidance and sparked a debate: Is this a value trap or a strategic entry point.

headline: Domino’s expects Papa Johns, Pizza Hut to close more stores
summary: CEO Russell Weiner predicts pizza competitors will see more profitability issues as they offer steep discounts to drive sales, while Domino’s franchisees continue to improve margins.

headline: Yum Brands Cross Brand Value Menus Draw Investor Attention On Valuation
summary: Yum! Brands (NYSE:YUM) is rolling out new value deals developed jointly across Taco Bell, KFC, and Habit Burger & Grill. The group is using shared menu and pricing playbooks to shape offers such as Taco Bell’s Luxe Value Menu and Habit Burger’s $6, $8, and $10 deals. This coordinated approach is aimed at appealing to cost conscious diners and tightening the connection between Yum! Brands’ major banners. For investors watching quick service restaurants, Yum! Brands sits at the center of a...
